mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTACHMENTS ( ID, TABLE_NAME, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_TYPE, FILENAME, DISK_FILENAME, FILESIZE, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATED_ON, DISK_DIRECTORY ) VALUES ( att_seq.NEXTVAL, #{tableName}, #{containerId}, #{containerType}, #{fileName}, #{diskFileName}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, SYSDATE, #{diskDirectory} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TABLE_NAME, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_TYPE, FILENAME, DISK_FILENAME, FILESIZE, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATED_ON, DISK_DIRECTORY FROM ATTACHMENTS WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND CONTAINER_ID = #{containerId} ORDER BY ID ASC
SELECT ID, TABLE_NAME, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_TYPE, FILENAME, DISK_FILENAME, FILESIZE, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATED_ON, DISK_DIRECTORY FROM ATTACHMENTS WHERE id =#{id}
